chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-4725 of 2015 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Direction For hearing of CMA 10211/2016 14-09-2023 Petitioner Mansoor Ashraf, present in person. Mr. Qurban Ali Malano, Advocate for respondents No.5 to 8. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. ***** Listed application, filed under Article 204 of the Constitution, seeking enforcement of para-19 of the judgment dated 30.08.2016, whereby this petition was allowed and the alleged contemnors were directed to put the petitioner back into possession of the subject premises, from which, as per his case, he was forcibly removed, and return the articles belonging to petitioner and mentioned in the inventory, prepared by the Commissioner appointed by the Court, is taken up. Petitioner has filed written arguments to this application, a copy of which he has shared with learned counsel appearing on behalf of the respondents, whose case to contest this application, is that petitioner had filed a Civil Suit No.107 of 2014 and the alleged contemnors had filed a Rent Application No.47 of 2014. Petitioner was seeking several relief(s) including declaration, damages and possession, which when compromised was reached between the parties, the petitioner himself withdrew by way of a statement dated 08.03.2022 mentioning such fact of compromise, which was accordingly allowed on the same date. 2 Then alleged contemnors on the same date, on the basis of such consideration i.e. compromise withdrew the Rent Application, as the matter outside of the Court was settled between them and the articles were delivered to him.

Petitioner has filed written arguments to this application, a copy of which he has shared with learned counsel appearing on behalf of the respondents, whose case to contest this application, is that petitioner had filed a Civil Suit No.107 of 2014 and the alleged contemnors had filed a Rent Application No.47 of 2014. Petitioner was seeking several relief(s) including declaration, damages and possession, which when compromised was reached between the parties, the petitioner himself withdrew by way of a statement dated 08.03.2022 mentioning such fact of compromise, which was accordingly allowed on the same date. 2 Then alleged contemnors on the same date, on the basis of such consideration i.e. compromise withdrew the Rent Application, as the matter outside of the Court was settled between them and the articles were delivered to him. Before we proceed further, let respondents/alleged contemnors file reply(s) to the written arguments with the documentary proof of handing over articles to the petitioner, as mentioned in the inventory prepared by the Commissioner. Adjourned to 25.10.2023. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
